mapper.select: select c.id, c.change_code, c.title, c.change_type, c.priority, c.status, c.proposer_id, proposer.real_name as proposer_name, c.approver_id, approver.real_name as approver_name, c.reason, c.impact_analysis, c.decision_comment, c.submitted_at, c.decided_at from change_request c left join sys_user proposer on proposer.id = c.proposer_id left join sys_user approver on approver.id = c.approver_id where c.id = #{id} and c.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, change_code, title, change_type, priority, status, proposer_id, approver_id, reason, impact_analysis, decision_comment, submitted_at, decided_at, implemented_at, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted from change_request where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update change_request set status = #{status}, approver_id = #{approverId}, decision_comment = #{decisionComment}, decided_at = #{decidedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select l.id, l.change_request_id, l.action, l.from_status, l.to_status, l.operator_id, u.real_name as operator_name, l.comment, l.created_at from change_request_log l left join sys_user u on u.id = l.operator_id where l.change_request_id = #{changeRequestId} order by l.created_at desc
